title: SSO Outage Response
checklist: Confirm affected identity provider, tenant, and user scope.
Validate current SAML/OAuth configuration and recent auth changes.
Open incident channel with support lead, identity owner, and on-call engineer.
Publish first customer update with impact, workaround status, and next update time.
Track mitigation, recovery validation, and post-incident follow-up.
escalation_policy: Page identity on-call immediately for enterprise-wide login outage; update the customer every 30 minutes until mitigated.
customer_update_template: We are treating this as a high-priority SSO incident affecting {ticket_id}. Our identity engineering team is validating the SAML/OAuth path now. Next update: within 30 minutes.

title: Webhook Regression Triage
checklist: Collect failing webhook IDs, timestamps, regions, and response codes.
Compare failure pattern against recent deploys and integration changes.
Create engineering escalation with reproduction details and customer impact.
Confirm retry backlog and any safe replay or mitigation option.
Send customer update with investigation status and next evidence request.
escalation_policy: Escalate to integrations engineering when 5xx, replay failures, or enterprise production impact is present.
customer_update_template: We are investigating the webhook regression on {ticket_id}. Please keep any failing delivery IDs available while engineering checks recent deploy and retry behavior.

title: Billing Dispute Review
checklist: Capture invoice number, disputed line items, and contract terms.
Compare billing-system seat counts against entitlement history.
Route exception request to finance owner when credit or refund is likely.
Prepare customer-facing explanation with correction timeline.
Record resolution decision and update account notes.
escalation_policy: Route to finance for disputes involving duplicate charges, refunds, or contract interpretation.
customer_update_template: We are reviewing the billing details for {ticket_id}, including the disputed invoice lines and entitlement history. We will follow up with findings and any correction path.

title: Privacy Export Handling
checklist: Verify requester identity and authorization for the account.
Confirm export scope, retention expectations, and deletion state.
Engage privacy/compliance owner before sharing regulated data guidance.
Document legal basis, systems checked, and customer-facing answer.
Send reviewed response with limitations and next compliance contact.
escalation_policy: Require privacy owner review before committing export scope, deleted-record handling, or regulated-data timelines.
customer_update_template: We are reviewing the privacy export request for {ticket_id} with our compliance owner to confirm scope and retention handling before we provide final guidance.

title: API Key Rotation Guidance
checklist: Identify active keys, integrations, owners, and rotation deadline.
Create secondary key and deploy it to production consumers first.
Verify traffic on the new key and monitor authentication errors.
Revoke the old key after successful cutover and document rollback state.
Send final guidance with rotation evidence and recommended cadence.
escalation_policy: Escalate to security for suspected key exposure; otherwise route as guided support with platform owner validation.
customer_update_template: For {ticket_id}, we recommend a staged API key rotation: add the new key, validate production traffic, then revoke the old key after monitoring confirms cutover.
